name: Live Biotherapeutics and Engineered Microbes Registry Metadata Refresh

scope.question: Do current ClinicalTrials.gov and PubMed checks for stale Live Biotherapeutics and Engineered Microbes trial-watch records change the public outlook or only clear local registry metadata debt?

summary: Ran a bounded Live Biotherapeutics and Engineered Microbes registry metadata refresh after the scoped trial-watch audit showed five stale or missing registry checks, one missing expected-results window, and zero open stale watch items. Direct ClinicalTrials.gov API checks refreshed SYNB1618 NCT03516487, TWK10 NCT04893746, pasteurized Akkermansia MucT NCT05417360, AKK-WST01 NCT04797442, Akkermansia muciniphila NCT02637115, and the current GIANTS-1 NCT07363057 watchlist record. The completed local records remain represented by existing peer-reviewed results, GIANTS-1 remains recruiting with no posted results, and same-window PubMed plus narrow registry searches did not find a new result-bearing human aging-relevant live-biotherapeutic source. A close HB05P pasteurized-Akkermansia older-adult muscle-strength registry was found but has no posted results and is recorded as future coverage-repair context rather than a metadata-refresh public change.

materiality_decision.rationale: This pass cleared stale local trial-details metadata and the GIANTS-1 expected-results-window gap. The current registry and PubMed checks do not add new efficacy, safety, durability, disease, mortality, or broad aging evidence beyond already represented results. HB05P/NCT07402278 is relevant no-results trial-horizon context, but adding a new public trial-watch record should be handled as a separate coverage-repair or staged-source decision rather than folded into this metadata batch.

search_log.summary: Scoped report contained 6 registry-linked studies, 0 missing trial-detail records, 5 stale or missing registry checks, 1 detail record missing expected_results_window, and 0 open stale watch items.

search_log.query: Direct checks for NCT03516487, NCT04893746, NCT05417360, NCT04797442, NCT02637115, and NCT07363057
search_log.summary: The stale completed/post-result records were retrievable and unchanged in public interpretation. GIANTS-1 NCT07363057 remains recruiting with no posted results, last update posted January 26, 2026, primary completion estimated May 2026, and study completion estimated October 1, 2026.

search_log.query: Akkermansia older adults trial; TWK10 frail older adults; SYNB1618 engineered E. coli; live biotherapeutic aging microbiome older adults; GIANTS-1 GIB-7 GI-102 immune aging
search_log.summary: Narrow registry searches returned the represented TWK10 and GIANTS-1 records, wrong-scope or pediatric/metabolic records, and one close new no-results registry: NCT07402278, a completed pasteurized Akkermansia muciniphila HB05P trial for muscle strength in older adults with no posted results.

search_log.query: (Akkermansia OR Akkermansia muciniphila OR AKK-WST01 OR MucT) AND (aging OR elderly OR older OR frailty OR obesity OR diabetes OR metabolic OR trial) AND 2026/06/06:2026/06/14[edat]; TWK10, SYNB1618, PA53, GIANTS-1, GIB-7, and GI-102 same-window checks
search_log.summary: Same-window PubMed checks found Akkermansia review, mechanistic, gut-liver, tumor-microbiome, polyphenol, postbiotic, and wrong-scope context, plus a living-drug-carrier review. More specific human older-adult/trial and SYNB1618/TWK10/PA53/GIANTS checks did not find a new result-bearing live-biotherapeutic human aging source.

search_log.query: HB05P OR NCT07402278 OR pasteurized Akkermansia OR Akkermansia muciniphila HB05P
search_log.summary: The HB05P query returned Akkermansia mechanism, review, preclinical, postbiotic, and the already represented pasteurized Akkermansia MucT result context, but no NCT07402278 result publication.

trial_watch_checks.summary: The SYNB1618 registry remains completed with no ClinicalTrials.gov results section; the peer-reviewed PMID 34294923 result remains the public evidence source.
The TWK10 registry remains completed with no ClinicalTrials.gov results section; the peer-reviewed PMID 34361902 result remains the public evidence source.
The pasteurized Akkermansia MucT registry remains completed with no ClinicalTrials.gov results section; the peer-reviewed PMID 42120725 result remains the public evidence source.

The AKK-WST01 registry remains unknown-status with no ClinicalTrials.gov results section; the peer-reviewed PMID 39879980 result remains the public evidence source, and local metadata now records the registry date-kind boundary.
The Akkermansia muciniphila pilot registry remains completed with no ClinicalTrials.gov results section; the peer-reviewed PMID 31263284 result remains the public evidence source.
GIANTS-1 remains recruiting with no ClinicalTrials.gov results section. Local metadata was refreshed with the June 14 check and an explicit expected-results boundary.

excluded_sources.title: Evaluation of HB05P for Muscle Strength Improvement in Older Adults
excluded_sources.reason: Completed pasteurized Akkermansia muciniphila HB05P older-adult muscle-strength registry with no posted results. It is relevant trial-watch context, but staging a new public source/study should be handled in a separate coverage-repair or trial-watch pass.

excluded_sources.title: Pharmaco-microdynamics (PMD): Redefining Dose, Exposure, and Control for Living Drug Carriers.
excluded_sources.reason: Review-level living-drug-carrier framework; it does not report a new human aging-relevant live-biotherapeutic intervention result.

excluded_sources.title: Modulating the Gut-Liver Axis: Anti-Inflammatory Mechanisms of Probiotics and Prebiotics in MASLD.
excluded_sources.reason: Review-level probiotic/prebiotic MASLD context, not a new live-biotherapeutic or engineered-microbe aging trial result.

excluded_sources.title: Pasteurized Akkermansia muciniphila alleviates high-fat diet-induced bone loss via Nr4a1-dependent Treg differentiation.
excluded_sources.reason: Preclinical pasteurized Akkermansia mechanism context; it does not change the human live-biotherapeutic evidence map in this metadata pass.

notes: This pass was selected manually from the global stale registry-check report and kept to one track-level metadata batch.
The completed local studies remain posted-result context because their result-bearing peer-reviewed sources are already represented.
HB05P/NCT07402278 is relevant no-results trial-watch context but was not staged because this pass was explicitly scoped to refreshing existing local trial metadata.
next_actions: Regenerate the scoped and global trial-watch reports so the State of the Field blocker reflects the refreshed live-biotherapeutics metadata.
Consider a separate live-biotherapeutics coverage-repair or trial-watch pass for HB05P/NCT07402278 if public trial-horizon completeness is prioritized.
Continue the stale registry metadata queue with the next coherent track-level batch rather than mixing unrelated tracks in one session.
